title: Killing Me Softly
why_this_song: Killing Me Softly by Lauryn Hill (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Killing me softly with his song"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Killing me softly with his song"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Killing me softly with his song"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Singin' my life with his words"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Singin' my life with his words"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Killing me softly with his song
Killing me softly with his song, telling my whole life
With his words, killing me softly with his song
Killing me softly with his song
Killing me softly with his song, telling my whole life
With his words, killing me softly, softly with his song
Bring it around y'all, one more time

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "softly" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "softly" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "song" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "song" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Strummin' my pain with his fingers
Singin' my life with his words (two times)
Killing me softly with his song

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Killing Me Softly", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Killing Me Softly", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Killing Me Softly" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Killing Me Softly" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Killing Me Softly" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Killing Me Softly", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
